This escalating violence follows earlier deadly incidents and a prison raid, highlighting the persistent threat in the region.

title: 'Khamma Ghani': Gill, Rashid tease Rajasthan with witty social media post
description: Gujarat Titans crushed Rajasthan Royals by 77 runs after posting 229/4, powered by Shubman Gill’s 84 and Sai Sudharsan’s 55. Rashid Khan starred with 4/33 as Rajasthan collapsed for 152 despite a quickfire 36 from teenager Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. Gill later mocked Rajasthan online, posting: “Pink city, blue result. Khamma Ghani.”

title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship to arrive in Tenerife today; WHO chief reaches Spanish island
description: Passengers from the hantavirus-affected MV Hondius will disembark in Tenerife on Sunday. Three passengers have died, and five others tested positive after leaving the ship. The Andes virus strain, which can spread person-to-person, was detected. Spanish authorities confirmed the deceased and their belongings will not be unloaded.

IPL Playoff Probabilities: GT’s win lifts odds to 72.52%; RR still at 80.31%
description: Gujarat Titans surged to second place with a dominant 77-run victory over Rajasthan Royals, significantly boosting their playoff chances to 72.52%. Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan starred with the bat, while Rashid Khan impressed with the ball. Despite the loss, Rajasthan Royals maintain a higher overall playoff probability due to their easier remaining schedule.

description: Iran's IRGC has warned of a "heavy assault" on US military assets and ships if Iranian oil tankers or commercial vessels are attacked in the Strait of Hormuz. This follows US forces disabling two Iranian oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman and an earlier exchange of fire near the strait.

Rajasthan Royals equal all-time unwanted IPL record vs Gujarat Titans
description: Rajasthan Royals have equalled an IPL record by conceding seven totals of over 200 runs in a single season. This worrying bowling trend follows a strong start to IPL 2026. Gujarat Titans posted 229/4 against them in Jaipur. Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan starred for GT. This puts immense pressure on Rajasthan's batting.

title: I'm CM for all, says Suvendu Adhikari, shuts up 'Jai Shri Ram' chant
description: In his inaugural address, Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari called on his supporters at Jorasanko Thakurbari to move away from partisan slogans like 'Jai Shri Ram,' stating that his leadership embodies the spirit of every citizen in Bengal. He emphasized the urgent need to repair and rejuvenate the state's educational and cultural landscape, drawing inspiration from Rabindranath Tagore’s vision.

title: ‘Missiles, drones locked on US targets’: Iran’s fresh threat to US as peace talks are stalled
West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari picks ex-EC observer as his adviser
description: In a notable move, the Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari has welcomed the expertise of retired IAS officer Subrata Gupta as an adviser, shortly after Gupta wrapped up his role as a special observer for the recent assembly elections. Additionally, Shantanu Bala has been entrusted with the position of CM's private secretary.

Trespasser killed after being hit by plane during takeoff at Denver airport; 17 injured
description: A trespasser was killed after being struck by a Frontier Airlines flight during takeoff at Denver International Airport. The individual had breached security by jumping the perimeter fence and running onto the runway. Seventeen people were injured in the incident, with the pilot stopping takeoff procedures immediately.

title: Uttar Pradesh Cabinet expansion today: Meet the six new ministers likely to take oath
Jadeja's cheeky 'player in pocket' send-off to Buttler goes viral - Watch
description: Ravindra Jadeja unveiled a novel "player in pocket" celebration after dismissing Jos Buttler during the Gujarat Titans vs. Rajasthan Royals IPL 2026 match. This fresh gesture added a new dimension to his iconic on-field expressions, following a crucial wicket taken by Donovan Ferreira.

Miami boat explosion: At least 15 injured near Haulover Sandbar - what we know so far
description: A boat explosion near Miami's Haulover Sandbar on Saturday afternoon sent at least 11 people to hospitals. Emergency crews responded to the "possible vessel explosion" in Biscayne Bay, a popular party spot. A charter boat was involved, with preliminary information suggesting a potential gas leak. A large-scale rescue operation was launched, and an investigation into the cause is ongoing.

title: Congress struggles in Kerala for consensus as CM hopefuls push claims
description: Congress leaders Mallikarjun Kharge and Rahul Gandhi are deliberating on the next Chief Minister of Kerala. V D Satheesan, K C Venugopal, and Ramesh Chennithala are the key contenders. The party is also addressing factional protests. A decision is expected soon after consulting with party legislators and allies. The leadership aims for consensus to avoid internal discord.

title: Is this the perfect Mother’s Day breakfast?
SUV grazes MP Supriya Sule's car on Mumbai-Pune Expressway, all escape unhurt
description: NCP (SP) MP Supriya Sule's car was grazed by an SUV on the Mumbai-Pune Expressway near the Madap tunnel due to reckless driving. While Sule and her companions escaped unhurt, the Khalapur police have registered an FIR against the SUV driver for rash and negligent driving.

'When I was ill, she would beat me': Nanny alleges assault at IIM-Bangalore professor’s home
description: A 23-year-old nanny from Manipur has accused her employer's wife of illegal confinement, assault, and starvation at their IIM-Bangalore campus residence. The woman claims the abuse began in 2021, culminating in her being locked inside the house and denied food. Neighbours provided assistance, leading to a police case under relevant sections of the BNS.

title: Woman found tied, gagged and murdered inside locked house
description: A woman living alone in Mauganj district was found murdered inside her locked house, with her hands and legs tied and cloth stuffed in her mouth. Post-mortem confirmed death by suffocation. Police are investigating multiple angles, including robbery and personal rivalry, and are analyzing technical data.

description: A 26-year-old man allegedly murdered a young woman in Mandideep after she refused to become his second wife. The accused, Manoj Ahirwar, was arrested within 24 hours following a manhunt. The victim's mother was also injured while attempting to intervene during the fatal attack.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn; gives 540 workers $240m
description: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.
